name: Nextracker Inc.
description: Nextracker Inc. is a leading provider of intelligent, integrated solar tracker and software solutions used in utility-scale and ground-mounted distributed generation solar projects. The company's products enable solar panels in utility-scale power plants to follow the sun's movement across the sky and optimize plant performance. With operations across the United States and internationally, Nextracker focuses on delivering high-performance solar tracking technology that increases energy production while reducing costs for project developers and owners, playing a critical role in the global transition to renewable energy.
